parameters-en.Wave: Selects one of 8 crazy sci-fi effects. These aren't so much musical as they are weird fun and perhaps a method of scaring away small woodland creatures.
parameters-en.Filter: Controls the frequency of the filter, which determines the brightness of your sound.
parameters-en.Decay: Slightly controls the decay of the synth.
parameters-en.Mix: Blends more of the effect in. Note that even at 0%, some of the synth will be heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
